_meta.name: meditation-mainpages-knowledge
_meta.purpose: Meditation 主词深度页知识层（补 9 交叉页之上的纯冥想漏斗上层）
_meta.eastern_accuracy: shamatha/vipassana=南传上座部；Dzogchen/Mahamudra=藏传；子午卯酉=道家内丹活子时（非泛中医）。按类型选准确传统术语，不混贴

mainpages.title: How to Meditate: A Complete Beginner's Guide
mainpages.definition: Meditation is a practice of training attention and awareness. This guide covers how to start meditating with simple, repeatable steps for beginners.

steps: Find a quiet seat and set a timer (5-10 minutes to start)
Sit upright but relaxed — spine tall, shoulders soft
Rest hands on lap, close eyes or soften gaze
Notice your natural breath without changing it
When the mind wanders, gently return attention to the breath
End by noticing how you feel before opening eyes
calculation.example: Begin with 5 minutes daily; consistency matters more than duration

faq_seeds: How do I start meditating as a beginner?
How long should I meditate?
What do I do if I can't stop thinking?
mainpages.eastern_note: 南传内观：shamatha (止) 与 vipassana (观) 是基础；道家：子午卯酉活子时宜静坐（非泛中医时辰）

mainpages.title: Types of Meditation: 9 Styles Explained
mainpages.definition: There are many meditation styles — mindfulness, loving-kindness, body scan, transcendental, breath, walking, chakra, third-eye, and visualization. This guide compares them so you can choose what fits you.
faq_seeds: What are the main types of meditation?
Which type of meditation is best for beginners?
How do I choose a meditation style?
mainpages.eastern_note: 南传：anapanasati/metta；藏传：Dzogchen 大圆满、Mahamudra 大手印；道家内丹 — 各传统有专属术语

mainpages.title: Mindfulness Meditation: How to Practice
mainpages.definition: Mindfulness meditation is the practice of paying attention to the present moment without judgment. It originates from Buddhist traditions and is now widely practiced secularly.

steps: Anchor attention on breath or body
Notice when mind wanders (this is normal)

faq_seeds: What is mindfulness meditation?
How is mindfulness different from meditation?
How long to see benefits?
mainpages.eastern_note: 南传：sati (念) 是核心；藏传：Dzogchen 的 natural awareness 同向

mainpages.title: Benefits of Meditation: What Science Says
mainpages.definition: Research suggests meditation may support stress reduction, focus, emotional regulation, and well-being. This guide reviews what evidence supports — and what remains open.

steps: Stress: studies suggest reduced cortisol and perceived stress
Focus: some studies show improved attention
Sleep: mindful practices linked to better wind-down
Caution: benefits vary; not a medical treatment

faq_seeds: What are the benefits of meditation?
Does meditation really work?
How long until I see benefits?
mainpages.eastern_note: 东方传统描述为 'calm/clear' 状态；科学角度平行参照，非医疗断言

mainpages.title: Meditation Techniques for Beginners: 7 Methods
mainpages.definition: Specific meditation techniques — breath counting, mantra, visualization, body scan — are the practical tools within a meditation practice. This covers concrete techniques to try.
faq_seeds: What are easy meditation techniques?
Which technique is best for anxiety?
How do I practice breath counting?
mainpages.eastern_note: 技法跨传统：南传 anapanasati 计数；藏传 mantra；道家守窍 — 按技法归属标传统

mainpages.title: Walking Meditation: How to Practice Mindful Walking
mainpages.definition: Walking meditation ( kinhin in Zen) is the practice of bringing mindful awareness to the act of walking — coordinating breath and steps.

steps: Match breath to steps if comfortable

faq_seeds: What is walking meditation?
How is it different from sitting meditation?
How fast should I walk?
mainpages.eastern_note: 禅宗 kinhin (经行)；南传 cankama — 步行禅传统

mainpages.title: Chakra Meditation: Balancing the 7 Energy Centers
mainpages.definition: Chakra meditation focuses attention on the seven energy centers (chakras) described in tantric traditions, from root to crown.

steps: Sit and ground through the root chakra
Move attention up: sacral, solar plexus, heart
At each, breathe and visualize its color/quality
Pair each chakra with a supporting crystal

faq_seeds: What is chakra meditation?
How do I open my chakras?
Which crystals for which chakra?
mainpages.eastern_note: 坦特罗/藏传：脉轮 (chakra) 体系源自印度坦特罗；按传统归属

mainpages.title: Third Eye Meditation: Opening the Ajna Center
mainpages.definition: Third eye meditation focuses attention on the ajna (brow) center, associated in tantric traditions with intuition and inner vision.

steps: Sit and bring attention to the space between eyebrows
Visualize indigo light at the brow
Pair with amethyst or lapis lazuli

faq_seeds: What is third eye meditation?
How do I open my third eye?
Which crystals support the third eye?
mainpages.eastern_note: 印度坦特罗：ajna 脉轮；藏传 Dzogchen 亦有相应修法

mainpages.title: Breath Meditation (Anapanasati): A Complete Guide
mainpages.definition: Breath meditation, or anapanasati in the Theravada tradition, is the practice of mindfulness of breathing — one of the oldest meditation methods.

steps: Sit and let breath flow naturally
Notice the sensation at nostrils or belly
Count breaths 1-10 if helpful, then restart
Rest in bare awareness of breathing

faq_seeds: What is breath meditation?
How do I practice anapanasati?
Should I control my breath?
mainpages.eastern_note: 南传上座部：anapanasati (安那般那念) 是佛陀教导的核心止观法门

mainpages.title: Loving-Kindness Meditation (Metta): How to Practice
mainpages.definition: Loving-kindness meditation, or metta in the Theravada tradition, cultivates compassion by silently repeating well-wishing phrases toward oneself and others.

steps: Sit and offer phrases to yourself: 'May I be well'

faq_seeds: What is loving-kindness meditation?
What are metta phrases?
How does metta help?
mainpages.eastern_note: 南传上座部：metta (慈心) 是四无量心 (brahmavihara) 之首

mainpages.title: Body Scan Meditation: A Step-by-Step Guide
mainpages.definition: Body scan meditation systematically moves attention through the body from feet to head, noticing sensation without judgment — a core MBSR technique.

steps: Slowly move up: feet, legs, hips, belly
Notice each area, release tension, breathe

faq_seeds: What is a body scan meditation?
How long should a body scan take?
What are the benefits?
mainpages.eastern_note: 现代 MBSR (Kabat-Zinn) 源自南传内观 body sweep；平行参照

mainpages.title: Transcendental Meditation: What It Is & How It Works
mainpages.definition: Transcendental Meditation (TM) is a specific mantra-based technique taught by certified instructors. This guide explains the practice objectively.

steps: TM uses a personalized mantra given in official instruction
Note: the specific mantra requires certified teaching — this guide explains, does not teach

faq_seeds: What is transcendental meditation?
How is TM different from mindfulness?
Can I learn TM on my own?
mainpages.eastern_note: 源自印度吠陀传统 (Maharishi Mahesh Yogi 普及)；注明传统来源

mainpages.title: Meditation Postures: How to Sit for Meditation
mainpages.definition: A stable, comfortable posture supports meditation. This guide covers sitting, kneeling, chair, and lying postures for different bodies.

steps: Key: spine tall, shoulders relaxed, alert-yet-easy

faq_seeds: What is the best meditation posture?
Can I meditate in a chair?
How do I sit without pain?
mainpages.eastern_note: 瑜伽 asana；禅宗坐禅 (坐姿)；跨传统通用坐姿原则

mainpages.title: How Long Should I Meditate? A Guide for Beginners
mainpages.definition: There is no single 'correct' meditation duration. This guide helps you choose based on experience, goals, and consistency.

steps: Listen to your capacity — not more is better

faq_seeds: How long should a beginner meditate?
Is 10 minutes of meditation enough?
How long until benefits?
mainpages.eastern_note: 东方传统强调 daily consistency (e.g. 道家每日子午坐)；平行参照
